result.reason: Introduce a mechanism to link connections to centralized CredentialRecord objects stored in a CredentialRepository, allowing credential reuse and central management.
result.approach: 1. Modify AbstractConnectionRecord to include a CredentialSource enum (Default, Specified, Linked) and make it inheritable. 2. In ConnectionInfo, adjust Username, Password, and Domain property getters to retrieve values from a CredentialRecord via CredentialServiceFacade when CredentialSource is Linked and a valid CredentialId is present. 3. Ensure CredentialId and CredentialSource are serialized/deserialized with connections. 4. Handle SecureString conversion for passwords during retrieval from CredentialRecord.
